entry.title: Independent writing
entry.content:
2023.03.12

There are two types of star teachers in college: those who enjoy great popularity among students and those who gain astonishing academic achievements in their fields. If I’m going to take a compulsory course in university, I would prefer the one taught by a popular professor rather than one who just obtained an academic reward.

Admittedly, teacher popularity does not necessarily equal teaching effectiveness, but the former is often a sure indicator of the latter. If you go through a survey on rating professors, you will meet lots of questions regarding how students feel in class. This is why many popular professors are known for imparting knowledge clearly and thoroughly. In other words, their classes are easy to catch up with. Since mandatory courses play a crucial role in both gaining a diploma and understanding advanced courses, learning them well is crucial for students. On the contrary, however, academic stars are often less effective teachers for two reasons. The obvious one is that they spend so much time on their research that the time allocated to the preparation of teaching is undoubtedly limited. A more subtle reason is that sometimes it is quite difficult for highly intelligent people to understand why ordinary ones fail to understand certain parts of a course. As a result, some students complain that the classes taught by professors renowned for their research are full of information but difficult to follow.

Also, popular teachers can motivate students to pursue a certain field. One of the most frequently mentioned traits of popular teachers is that they make their lectures intriguing. As the old saying goes, interest is the best teacher. This may sound exaggerated, but everyone knows the power of being obsessed. When people are interested in something, they will spend much time and effort on it unconsciously. What’s better, meanwhile, they feel entertained rather than tired. If students are attracted by a professor’s course, they tend to do more research on it and have a deep understanding of the subject. For instance, political science might be one of the most boring mandatory courses for most students. However, a professor in my university adopts various classroom activities and makes his class like a reality show. Every student enjoys the whole course and learns a lot. Many students take advanced courses taught by him and some of them even change their majors. Such magic seldom occurs in other types of teachers’ classrooms, whether they have achieved in academic fields or not.

To sum up, in many cases, professors gain their popularity mainly, if not totally, based on how well they teach. Therefore, if one values the quality of teaching, I strongly recommend him or her to take courses taught by popular professors instead of academic pioneers.

2023.03.25

Here are some specific reasons why developing the building into a modern shopping and entertainment center would be a good idea:

  1. Boosting the local economy: A modern shopping and entertainment center would attract shoppers and visitors from other areas, which would help to stimulate the local economy. By providing a range of retail and entertainment options, the center would create jobs, generate tax revenue, and increase foot traffic in the surrounding area.
  2. Providing a convenient and diverse shopping experience: City residents often have a variety of shopping needs, from groceries to clothing to electronics. A modern shopping and entertainment center would be able to cater to these diverse needs by offering a range of stores and services under one roof. This would make shopping more convenient and efficient for residents, as well as attract visitors from neighboring areas.
  3. Creating a social hub for the community: A modern shopping and entertainment center would provide a central location for residents to gather, socialize, and participate in community events. By offering entertainment options like cinemas and bowling alleys, the center would help to bring people together and foster a sense of community spirit.
  4. Enhancing the urban landscape: Large, vacant buildings can be an eyesore and a blight on the community. By developing the building into a modern shopping and entertainment center, the city could transform an unused space into an attractive and vibrant destination that would enhance the urban landscape.
  5. Providing a unique destination: A modern shopping and entertainment center could become a unique destination for visitors and tourists, helping to boost the city’s reputation and attract more visitors. By offering a range of shops and entertainment options that can’t be found elsewhere in the region, the center could become a must-visit destination for people from all over.

entry.title: 2.3 连续型随机变量
entry.content:
概率密度函数

定义(连续型随机变量,概率密度)

设随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布函数为 F(x)F(x)F(x) , 若存在非负可积函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) , 对任意实数 xxx , 均有

F(x)=∫−∞xf(t)dtF(x)=\int^x_{-\infty}f(t)dtF(x)=∫−∞x​f(t)dt

则称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 是连续型随机变量, 称函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 为 ξ\xiξ 的概率密度函数, 简称概率密度.

概率密度函数的性质

  1. 非负性: f(x)≥0f(x)\geq0f(x)≥0
  2. 规范性: ∫−∞+∞f(t)dt=1\displaystyle\int^{+\infty}_{-\infty}f(t)dt=1∫−∞+∞​f(t)dt=1

注

  1. 连续型随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布函数是绝对连续函数.
  2. ξ\xiξ 是连续型随机变量, 则对任意 x0∈Rx_0\in\mathbb{R}x0​∈R , 有 P{ξ=x0}=0P\{\xi=x_0\}=0P{ξ=x0​}=0 .
  3. P(Φ)=0P(\Phi)=0P(Φ)=0 , 但是其逆不真.

概率密度的直观解释

概率密度函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 表示变量 ξ\xiξ 在 xxx 点出的概率密度(类似于物理学中的线密度).

均匀分布

定义(均匀分布)

设随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的概率密度函数为

f(x)={1b−aa<x<b0其他f(x)=\begin{cases}\frac{1}{b-a} & a<x<b \\0 & \text{其他}\end{cases}f(x)={b−a1​0​a<x<b其他​

称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 在区间 (a,b)(a,b)(a,b) 上服从均匀分布, 记为 ξ∼U(a,b)\xi\sim U(a,b)ξ∼U(a,b) .

特点

  1. 随机变量 ξ\xiξ 在 (a,b)(a,b)(a,b) 上的取值的概率为 111 ;
  2. 随机变量 ξ\xiξ 落在 (a,b)(a,b)(a,b) 的子区间的概率与子区间位置无关, 仅与其测度(即长度)成正比.

意义

  1. 很多试验的随机变量服从均匀分布;
  2. 均匀分布是其它随机变量的计算机模拟基础.

指数分布

定义(指数分布)

设随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的概率密度函数为

f(x)={λe−λxx>00x≤0 ,(λ>0)f(x)=\begin{cases}\lambda e^{-\lambda x} & x>0 \\0 & x\leq 0\end{cases}\ ,\quad (\lambda>0)f(x)={λe−λx0​x>0x≤0​ ,(λ>0)

称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 服从参数为 λ\lambdaλ 的指数分布, 记为 ξ∼E(λ)\xi\sim E(\lambda)ξ∼E(λ) .

特点

指数分布具有无后效性. 即

P{ξ>t+s∣ξ>t}=P{ξ>s}P\{\xi>t+s|\xi>t\}=P\{\xi>s\}P{ξ>t+s∣ξ>t}=P{ξ>s}

正态分布

定义(正态分布)

设随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的概率密度函数为

φ(x;μ,σ2)=12πσe−(x−μ)22σ2 ,x∈R\varphi(x;\mu,\sigma^2)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}e^{-\frac{(x-\mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}}\ ,\quad x\in Rφ(x;μ,σ2)=2π​σ1​e−2σ2(x−μ)2​ ,x∈R

其中 μ,σ(σ>0)\mu,\sigma(\sigma>0)μ,σ(σ>0) 是常数, 则称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 服从参数为 μ,σ2\mu,\sigma^2μ,σ2 的正态分布或高斯分布, 记为 ξ∼N(μ,σ2)\xi\sim N(\mu,\sigma^2)ξ∼N(μ,σ2) .
特别地, 当 μ=0,σ=1\mu=0,\sigma=1μ=0,σ=1 时, 其概率密度函数为

φ(x)=φ(x;0,1)=12πe−x22 ,x∈R\varphi(x)=\varphi(x;0,1)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-\frac{x^2}{2}}\ , \quad x\in Rφ(x)=φ(x;0,1)=2π​1​e−2x2​ ,x∈R

则称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 服从标准正太分布, 即ξ∼N(0,1)\xi\sim N(0,1)ξ∼N(0,1) .

正态分布概率密度曲线的特征

  1. 概率曲线下总面积为1: ∫−∞+∞φ(x;μ,σ2)dx=1\displaystyle\int^{+\infty}_{-\infty}\varphi(x;\mu,\sigma^2)dx=1∫−∞+∞​φ(x;μ,σ2)dx=1
  2. 曲线关于直线 x=μx=\mux=μ 对称
  3. 参数 μ\muμ 确定了正态分布概率曲线的中心, 称为位置参数
  4. 曲线在 x=μx=\mux=μ 处取得最大值 1σ2π\frac{1}{\sigma\sqrt{2\pi}}σ2π​1​ , μ\muμ 固定, 则 σ2\sigma^2σ2 越大, 曲线越趋于平坦.

正太分布概率的计算

若随机变量 ξ∼N(μ,σ2)\xi\sim N(\mu,\sigma^2)ξ∼N(μ,σ2) , 其分布函数为

Φ(x;μ,σ2)=∫−∞x12πσe−(t−μ)22σ2 ,x∈R\Phi(x;\mu,\sigma^2)=\int^{x}_{-\infty} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}\sigma}e^{-\frac{(t-\mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}}\ ,\quad x\in RΦ(x;μ,σ2)=∫−∞x​2π​σ1​e−2σ2(t−μ)2​ ,x∈R

若随机变量 ξ\xiξ 服从标准正太分布 , 其分布函数为

Φ(x)=∫−∞x12πe−t22 ,x∈R\Phi(x)=\int^{x}_{-\infty} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-\frac{t^2}{2}}\ , \quad x\in RΦ(x)=∫−∞x​2π​1​e−2t2​ ,x∈R

Γ\varGammaΓ 分布

定义( Γ\varGammaΓ 分布)

设随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的概率密度函数为

f(x)={1βα+1Γ(α+1)xαe−xβx>00其他f(x)=\begin{cases}\frac{1}{\beta^{\alpha+1}\varGamma(\alpha+1)}x^{\alpha}e^{-\frac{x}{\beta}} & x>0 \\0 & \text{其他}\end{cases}f(x)={βα+1Γ(α+1)1​xαe−βx​0​x>0其他​

其中 α>−1,β>0\alpha>-1,\beta>0α>−1,β>0 , 则称 ξ\xiξ 服从 Γ\varGammaΓ 分布, 记为 ξ∼Γ[α,β]\xi\sim\varGamma\big[ \alpha,\beta \big]ξ∼Γ[α,β] .

定义( Γ\varGammaΓ 函数)

Γ(α)=∫0+7inftyxα−1e−xdx=2∫0+∞y2α−1e−y2dy\varGamma(\alpha)=\int^{+7infty}_{0} x^{\alpha-1}e^{-x}dx=2\int^{+\infty}_{0}y^{2\alpha-1}e^{-y^2}dyΓ(α)=∫0+7infty​xα−1e−xdx=2∫0+∞​y2α−1e−y2dy

Γ\varGammaΓ 函数的性质

  1. Γ(α)=(α−1)Γ(α−1)\varGamma(\alpha)=(\alpha-1)\varGamma(\alpha-1)Γ(α)=(α−1)Γ(α−1)
  2. Γ(1)=1\varGamma(1)=1Γ(1)=1
  3. Γ(12)=2\varGamma(\frac{1}{2})=\sqrt{2}Γ(21​)=2​
  4. Γ(n)=(n−1)Γ(n−1)=...=(n−1)!\varGamma(n)=(n-1)\varGamma(n-1)=...=(n-1)!Γ(n)=(n−1)Γ(n−1)=...=(n−1)!

注

  1. 指数分布是特殊的 Γ\varGammaΓ 分布 Γ(1,λ)\varGamma(1,\lambda)Γ(1,λ) ;
  2. Γ\varGammaΓ 分布是推导统计学三大分布的基础;
  3. 当 α\alphaα 为正整数时, Γ(α,β)\varGamma(\alpha,\beta)Γ(α,β) 是排队论中常用的等待时间的分布-- Erlang 分布;
  4. Γ\varGammaΓ 分布应用于水文统计或最大风速, 风压的计算.

混合(奇异型随机变量)

小结

generate a photo of a man in space

entry.title: 2.2 离散型随机变量
entry.content:
离散型随机变量与分布律

定义(离散型随机变量)

如果随机变量 ξ\xiξ 至多取可列无穷个数值: x1,x2,...x_1,x_2,...x1​,x2​,... , 记 pn=P{ξ=xn}p_n=P\{\xi=x_n\}pn​=P{ξ=xn​} , 且满足

  1. 非负性: pn≥0,∀np_n\geq 0, \forall npn​≥0,∀n ;
  2. 规范性: ∑i=1∞pn=1\displaystyle\sum^{\infty}_{i=1}p_n=1i=1∑∞​pn​=1 .
    则称 ξ\xiξ 是离散型随机变量, pnp_npn​ 是 ξ\xiξ 的分布律.

分布律的直观描述

  1. 质量分布图
  2. 概率分布图

常用离散型分布

贝努里试验与 0-1 分布

贝努里实验仅有两个基本事件: A,A‾A,\overline{A}A,A , 且 P(A)=p (0<p<1)P(A)=p\ (0<p<1)P(A)=p (0<p<1)
令ξ={1若事件 A 发生0若事件 A 不发生\xi = \begin{cases}1 &\text{若事件 A 发生} \\0 &\text{若事件 A 不发生}\end{cases}ξ={10​若事件 A 发生若事件 A 不发生​ , 则 ξ\xiξ 的分布律为 p{ξ=xi}={1−pξ=0pξ=1p\{\xi=x_i\} = \begin{cases}1-p &\xi=0\\p &\xi=1\end{cases}p{ξ=xi​}={1−pp​ξ=0ξ=1​ .

nnn 重贝努里试验与二项分布

定义( nnn 次重复独立试验, nnn 重贝努里试验)

将试验 EEE 按下述条件重复进行 nnn 次

  1. 每次试验的条件不变
  2. 各次试验的结果互不影响
    则称则 nnn 次试验为 nnn 次重复独立试验.
    称 nnn 次独立贝努里试验为 nnn 重贝努里试验, 或称贝努里概型.

分布律

nnn 重贝努里试验中事件 AAA 发生 kkk 次的概率为 pn(k)=Cnkpk(1−p)n−k, k=0,1,2,...,np_n(k)=C^k_np^k(1-p)^{n-k},\ k=0,1,2,...,npn​(k)=Cnk​pk(1−p)n−k, k=0,1,2,...,n .

定义(二项分布)

若随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布列为 P(ξ=k)=Cnkpk(1−p)n−k, k=0,1,2,...,nP(\xi=k)=C^k_np^k(1-p)^{n-k},\ k=0,1,2,...,nP(ξ=k)=Cnk​pk(1−p)n−k, k=0,1,2,...,n , 则称随机变量 ξ\xiξ 服从二项分布 ,记为 ξ∼B(n,p)\xi \sim B(n,p)ξ∼B(n,p) .

特点

仅关注 nnn 重贝努里试验中, 其中一个结果 AAA 发生的总次数.

泊松分布

定义(泊松分布)

若随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布律为 P{ξ=k}=λkk!e−λ, k=1,2,..., λ>0P\{\xi=k\}=\frac{\lambda^k}{k!}e^{-\lambda},\ k=1,2,...,\ \lambda>0P{ξ=k}=k!λk​e−λ, k=1,2,..., λ>0 ,则称 ξ\xiξ 服从参数为 λ\lambdaλ 的泊松分布, 记为 ξ∼P(λ)\xi \sim P(\lambda)ξ∼P(λ) .

泊松定理

若 lim⁡n→∞b(k;n,P−n)=lim⁡n→∞Cnkpnk(1−pn)n−k=λkk!e−λ, k=0,1,2,...,n\displaystyle\lim_{n\rightarrow\infty}b(k;n,P-n)=\lim_{n\rightarrow\infty}C^k_np^k_n(1-p_n)^{n-k}=\frac{\lambda^k}{k!}e^{-\lambda},\ k=0,1,2,...,nn→∞lim​b(k;n,P−n)=n→∞lim​Cnk​pnk​(1−pn​)n−k=k!λk​e−λ, k=0,1,2,...,n .

注

  1. 当 nnn 足够大, ppp 较小时(一般 n>50, np<5n>50,\ np<5n>50, np<5) 二项分布可近似为泊松分布, 有 b(k;n,p)=Cnkpk(1−p)n−k≈λkk!e−λb(k;n,p)=C^k_np^k(1-p)^{n-k}\approx\frac{\lambda^k}{k!}e^{-\lambda}b(k;n,p)=Cnk​pk(1−p)n−k≈k!λk​e−λ , 其中 λ=np\lambda=npλ=np .
  2. 实际问题中, 大量次独立重复试验中, "稀有事件"出现的次数可认为服从泊松分布.

意义

  1. 现实中大量随机变量服从泊松分布;
  2. 泊松分布可视为二项分布的极限分布.

超几何分布

设袋中有 NNN 个球, 其中有 MMM 个红球, N−MN-MN−M 个白球, 从袋中任取 nnn 个球, 其中的红球个数 ξ\xiξ 的分布律为

P{ξ=m}=CMmCN−Mn−mCNn, m=0,1,2,...,l; l=min⁡(n,M)P\{\xi=m\}=\frac{C_M^mC_{N-M}^{n-m}}{C_N^n},\ m=0,1,2,...,l;\ l=\min(n,M)P{ξ=m}=CNn​CMm​CN−Mn−m​​, m=0,1,2,...,l; l=min(n,M)

称 ξ\xiξ 服从超几何分布.

几何分布

随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布列为

P{ξ=k}=p(1−p)k−1, k=1,2,...P\{\xi=k\}=p(1-p)^{k-1},\ k=1,2,...P{ξ=k}=p(1−p)k−1, k=1,2,...

称 ξ\xiξ 服从几何分布.

帕斯卡分布(负二项分布)

随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布列为

P{ξ=k}=Ck−1r−1pr(1−p)k−r, k=r,r+1,...P\{\xi=k\}=C^{r-1}_{k-1}p^r(1-p)^{k-r},\ k=r,r+1,...P{ξ=k}=Ck−1r−1​pr(1−p)k−r, k=r,r+1,...

称 ξ\xiξ 服从负二项分布.

小结

entry.title: 2.1 随机变量的分布函数
entry.content:
随机变量

定义(随机变量)

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, ξ(ω)\xi(\omega)ξ(ω) 是定义在 Ω\OmegaΩ 上的单值实函数, 若对任意的实数 x∈Rx\in \mathbb{R}x∈R , 有 {ω:ξ(ω)≤x}\{\omega:\xi(\omega)\leq x\}{ω:ξ(ω)≤x} , 称 ξ(ω)\xi(\omega)ξ(ω) 是概率空间 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 上的随机变量, 记为 ξ\xiξ .

注

  1. {ω:ξ(ω)≤x}={ξ≤x}∈F\{\omega:\xi(\omega)\leq x\}=\{\xi\leq x\}\in F{ω:ξ(ω)≤x}={ξ≤x}∈F , 使 P{ξ≤x}P\{\xi\leq x\}P{ξ≤x} 总有意义.
  2. 通常 FFF 是包涵全体 {ξ≤x}\{\xi\leq x\}{ξ≤x} 的最小代数.
  3. 同一概率空间上可定义不同的随机变量.
  4. 随机变量的等价定义:
    若对任意 x∈Rx\in\mathbb{R}x∈R , 有 {ω:ξ(ω)≤x}∈F\{\omega:\xi(\omega)\leq x\}\in F{ω:ξ(ω)≤x}∈F , 称 ξ(ω)\xi(\omega)ξ(ω) 是概率空间 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 上的随机变量.

概率分布函数

定义(概率分布函数)

设 ξ(ω)\xi(\omega)ξ(ω) 是定义在概率空间 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 上的随机变量, xxx 是任意实数, 称函数 F(x)=P{ξ≤x}F(x)=P\{\xi\leq x\}F(x)=P{ξ≤x} 为随机变量 ξ\xiξ 的分布函数, F(x)F(x)F(x) 也记为 Fξ(x)F_{\xi}(x)Fξ​(x) .

注

分布函数 F(x)F(x)F(x) 的函数值表示事件"随机点 ξ\xiξ 落在 (−∞,x](-\infty,x](−∞,x] 内" 的概率.

分布函数的性质

  1. 单调性: F(x)F(x)F(x) 是单调不降函数;
  2. 连续性: F(x)F(x)F(x) 是右连续函数;
  3. 有界性: 0≤F(x)≤1, lim⁡x→−∞F(x)=0, lim⁡x→+∞f(x)=1\displaystyle 0\leq F(x)\leq 1,\ \lim_{x\rightarrow-\infty}F(x)=0,\ \lim_{x\rightarrow+\infty}f(x)=10≤F(x)≤1, x→−∞lim​F(x)=0, x→+∞lim​f(x)=1 .

小结

  1. 随机变量的本质是单值实函数.
  2. 分布函数的本质是概率, 它的作用是吧概率的计算函数化.
  3. 利用分布函数能够方便的计算 Borel 中的事件.
  4. 分布函数的3条性质来源于概率的性质.

entry.title: 1.4 事件的独立性
entry.content:
两个事件

定义( AAA 独立于 BBB )

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, A,B∈FA,B\in FA,B∈F , 且 P(B)>0P(B)>0P(B)>0 , 若 P(A∣B)=P(A)P(A|B)=P(A)P(A∣B)=P(A) 称事件 AAA 独立于 BBB .

定义( A,BA,BA,B 相互独立)

定义方式1

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, A,B∈FA,B\in FA,B∈F , 且 P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0 , 若 P(A∣B)=P(A),P(B∣A)=P(B)P(A|B)=P(A),P(B|A)=P(B)P(A∣B)=P(A),P(B∣A)=P(B) 称事件 AAA 与事件 BBB 相互独立.

定义方式2

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, A,B∈FA,B\in FA,B∈F , 若 P(A∪B)=P(A)P(B)P(A\cup B)=P(A)P(B)P(A∪B)=P(A)P(B) , 则称 AAA 与 BBB 相互独立.

性质

  1. 若事件 AAA 独立于事件 BBB , 且 P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0 , 则事件 BBB 独立与事件 AAA , 即 P(B∣A)=P(B)P(B|A)=P(B)P(B∣A)=P(B) .
  2. 设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, A,B∈FA,B\in FA,B∈F , 且 P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0P(A)>0,P(B)>0 , 则 AAA 与 BBB 相互独立的充分必要条件是 P(A∩B)=P(A)∩P(B)P(A\cap B)=P(A)\cap P(B)P(A∩B)=P(A)∩P(B) .
  3. 若事件 AAA 和事件 BBB 相互独立, 则下列三对事件分别也相互独立:
    1. A,B‾A,\overline{B}A,B ;
    2. A‾,B\overline{A},BA,B ;
    3. A‾,B‾\overline{A},\overline{B}A,B ;

注

  1. 事件的独立性是对称性质, 称为相互独立
  2. 两个事件相互独立的含义是: 其中一个事件发生与否不影响另一事件发生的概率.

nnn 个事件

定义(多个事件相互独立)

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, Ai∈F (i=1,2,...n)A_i\in F\ (i=1,2,...n)Ai​∈F (i=1,2,...n) , 若对任意的 s(1≤s≤n)s(1\leq s\leq n)s(1≤s≤n) 及 1≤i1≤i2≤...≤is≤n1\leq i_1\leq i_2\leq...\leq i_s\leq n1≤i1​≤i2​≤...≤is​≤n , 有

P(Ai1Ai2...Ais)=P(Ai1)P(Ai2)...P(Ais)P(A_{i_1}A_{i_2}...A_{i_s})=P(A_{i_1})P(A_{i_2})...P(A_{i_s})P(Ai1​​Ai2​​...Ais​​)=P(Ai1​​)P(Ai2​​)...P(Ais​​)

成立, 则事件 A1,A2,...AnA_1,A_2,...A_nA1​,A2​,...An​ 相互独立.

注

nnn 个事件相互独立的含义是: 其中任意有限个事件发生与否都不会影响其他事件发生的概率.

定义(两两独立)

若对一切 1≤i1≤i2≤n1\leq i_1\leq i_2\leq n1≤i1​≤i2​≤n , 有 P(Ai1Ai2)=P(Ai1)P(Ai2)P(A_{i_1}A_{i_2})=P(A_{i_1})P(A_{i_2})P(Ai1​​Ai2​​)=P(Ai1​​)P(Ai2​​) 成立, 则称事件 A1,A2,...,AnA_1,A_2,...,A_nA1​,A2​,...,An​ 两两独立.

注

nnn 个事件相互独立是比两两独立更强的结论.

性质

若事件 A1,A2,...,AnA_1,A_2,...,A_nA1​,A2​,...,An​ 相互独立, 则将 A1,A2,...,AnA_1,A_2,...,A_nA1​,A2​,...,An​ 中任意多个事件换成它们的对立事件后, 所得到的 nnn 个事件仍然相互对立.

小结

  1. 事件相互独立的含义:
  2. nnn 个事件相互独立与两两独立的关系:
  3. 事件独立性的用途:
    可以方便计算积事件、和事件(德摩根律+独立性转化为积事件)

entry.title: 1.3 概率模型与公理化结构
entry.content:
可测空间

定义(代数、σ\sigmaσ - 代数)

设随机试验 EEE 的样本空间为 Ω\OmegaΩ , FFF 是 Ω\OmegaΩ 的子集组成的集族, 满足:

  1. Ω∈F\Omega\in FΩ∈F ;
  2. 若 A∈FA\in FA∈F , 则 Aˉ∈F\bar{A}\in FAˉ∈F ;
  3. 若 Ai∈F(i=1,2,3,...n)A_i\in F(i=1,2,3,...n)Ai​∈F(i=1,2,3,...n) , 则 ∪i=1nAi∈F\cup^n_{i=1}A_i\in F∪i=1n​Ai​∈F,
    称 FFF 为代数(体).
    若 Ai∈F(=1,2,3,...)A_i\in F(=1,2,3,...)Ai​∈F(=1,2,3,...) , 则 ∪i=1∞Ai∈F\cup^\infty_{i=1}A_i\in F∪i=1∞​Ai​∈F,
    则称 FFF 为 σ\sigmaσ -代数(事件体).

注

若 Ω\OmegaΩ 数有限样本空间, 则 Ω\OmegaΩ 的代数 FFF 一定是 σ\sigmaσ -代数.

定义(Borel σ\sigmaσ - 代数)

由无限样本空间中所有开集经过至多可列次交, 并, 逆运算所得到集合组成的集族 F2F_2F2​ 也是一个 σ\sigmaσ-代数, 称为Borel σ\sigmaσ -代数.

定义(可测空间)

样本空间 Ω\OmegaΩ 和 σ\sigmaσ -代数的二元体 (Ω,F)(\Omega, F)(Ω,F) 称为可测空间.

可测空间的性质

  1. ∅∈F\emptyset\in F∅∈F ;
  2. 对可列交运算封闭;
  3. 对有限并, 有限交封闭;
  4. 对差运算封闭.

概率空间

定义(概率空间)

设 (Ω,F)(\Omega,F)(Ω,F) 是一可测空间, 对 A∈FA\in FA∈F , 定义在 FFF 上的实数集函数 P(A)P(A)P(A) 满足:

  1. 非负性
  2. 规范性
  3. 完全可加性
    称 PPP 是 (Ω,F)(\Omega,F)(Ω,F) 上的概率(测度), P(A)P(A)P(A) 是事件 AAA 的概率.
    三元体 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 称为概率(测度)空间.

一些常用的概率空间例子

Bernolli 概率空间

取 F=∅,A,Aˉ,ΩF={\emptyset,A,\bar{A},\Omega}F=∅,A,Aˉ,Ω, 其中 AAA 为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的非空真子集, 任取两个正数 ppp 与 qqq (p+q=1)(p+q=1)(p+q=1) , 令

P(∅)=0,P(A)=p,P(Aˉ)=q,P(Ω)=1P(\emptyset)=0,P(A)=p,P(\bar{A})=q,P(\Omega)=1P(∅)=0,P(A)=p,P(Aˉ)=q,P(Ω)=1

则 PPP是一个概率测度, conger Ω,F,P)\Omega,F,P)Ω,F,P) 是一个概率空间. 它描述的是 Bernoulli 试验的概率空间.

有限概率空间

样本空间为有限集 Ω={ω1,...,ωn}\Omega=\{\omega_1,...,\omega_n\}Ω={ω1​,...,ωn​} , 事件体 FFF 取 Ω\OmegaΩ 的幂集.
取n个非负实数 p1,p2,...,pnp_1,p_2,...,p_np1​,p2​,...,pn​ . 使 p1+p2+...+pn=1p_1+p_2+...+p_n=1p1​+p2​+...+pn​=1 .
最后, 对 Ω\OmegaΩ 的每一个子集 AAA 令

P(A)=∑ωi∈ApiP(A)=\sum_{\omega_i\in A}p_iP(A)=ωi​∈A∑​pi​

则, 此 ppp 是一个概率测度, 从而 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega, F, P)(Ω,F,P) 是一个概率空间, 称为有限概率空间.
特别地, 取 pi=1n,i=1,2,...,np_i=\frac{1}{n}, i=1,2,...,npi​=n1​,i=1,2,...,n , 就是古典概率型的概率空间.

离散概率空间

样本空间为可数集 Ω={ω1,ω2,...,ωn,...}\Omega=\{\omega_1,\omega_2,...,\omega_n,...\}Ω={ω1​,ω2​,...,ωn​,...} , 事件域 FFF 取为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的幂集.
取非负实数列 pn{p_n}pn​ 使 ∑n=1∞pn=1\displaystyle\sum^{\infty}_{n=1}p_n=1n=1∑∞​pn​=1 .
最后, 对 Ω\OmegaΩ 的每一个子集 AAA, 令

P(A)=∑ωi∈ApiP(A)=\sum_{\omega_i\in A}p_iP(A)=ωi​∈A∑​pi​

则, 此 PPP 是一个概率测度, 从而 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega, F, P)(Ω,F,P) 是一个概率空间, 称为离散概率空间.

一维几何概率空间

样本空间 Ω\OmegaΩ 为 (−∞,+∞)(-\infty,+\infty)(−∞,+∞) 中的Borel 点集, 具有正的有限的勒贝格测度 μ(⋅)\mu(\cdot)μ(⋅) (长度概念的推广), 事件体 FFF 取作 Ω\OmegaΩ 的Borel 集类.
对每个事件 AAA , 取 P(A)=μ(A)μ(Ω)P(A)=\frac{\mu(A)}{\mu(\Omega)}P(A)=μ(Ω)μ(A)​ ,
则 PPP 为一概率测度, (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为几何概率型的概率空间.

概率的性质

设 (ω,F,P)(\omega,F,P)(ω,F,P) 是概率空间, 则概率 PPP 有如下性质:

空事件概率为0

P(∅)=0P(\emptyset)=0P(∅)=0

有限可加性

若 Ai∈F,i=1,2,...,nA_i\in F, i=1,2,...,nAi​∈F,i=1,2,...,n ; Ai∩Aj=∅,(i≠j)A_i\cap A_j=\emptyset,(i\not=j)Ai​∩Aj​=∅,(i=j)
则

P(∪i=1nAi)=∑i=1nP(A)P(\cup^{n}_{i=1}A_i)=\sum^{n}_{i=1}P(A)P(∪i=1n​Ai​)=i=1∑n​P(A)

推论

  1. P(A)+P(Aˉ)=1P(A)+P(\bar{A})=1P(A)+P(Aˉ)=1 ;
  2. 若 B⊂AB\subset AB⊂A , 则 P(A−B)=P(A)−P(B)P(A-B)=P(A)-P(B)P(A−B)=P(A)−P(B) 且 P(A)≥P(B)P(A)\geq P(B)P(A)≥P(B) .

概率的连续性

若 A1⊂A2⊂...A_1\subset A_2\subset...A1​⊂A2​⊂... , 且 ∩n=1∞An=∅\displaystyle\cap^{\infty}_{n=1}A_n=\emptyset∩n=1∞​An​=∅ , 则 lim⁡n→∞P(An)=0\displaystyle\lim_{n\rightarrow\infty}P(A_n)=0n→∞lim​P(An​)=0 .

推论

  1. 若 A1⊂A2⊂...A_1\subset A_2\subset...A1​⊂A2​⊂... , 且 ∩n=1∞An=A\displaystyle\cap^{\infty}_{n=1}A_n=A∩n=1∞​An​=A , 则lim⁡n→∞P(An)=P(A)\displaystyle\lim_{n\rightarrow\infty}P(A_n)=P(A)n→∞lim​P(An​)=P(A) .
  2. 若 A1⊃A2⊃...A_1\supset A_2\supset...A1​⊃A2​⊃... , 且 ∪n=1∞An=A\displaystyle\cup^{\infty}_{n=1}A_n=A∪n=1∞​An​=A , 则lim⁡n→∞P(An)=P(A)\displaystyle\lim_{n\rightarrow\infty}P(A_n)=P(A)n→∞lim​P(An​)=P(A) .

定理

设 PPP 为可测空间 (Ω,F)(\Omega,F)(Ω,F) 上的非负实值函数, P(Ω)=1P(\Omega)=1P(Ω)=1 , 则 PPP 完全可加的充分必要条件是:

  1. PPP 是有限可加的;
  2. PPP 是上连续的.

多除少补原理

设 Ai∈F,i=1,2,...,nA_i\in F, i=1,2,...,nAi​∈F,i=1,2,...,n , 有

P(∪i=1nAi)=∑i=1nP(Ai)−∑1≤i<k≤nP(AiAk)+...+(−1)n+1P(∩i=1nAi).P(\cup^n_{i=1}A_i)=\sum^n_{i=1}P(A_i)-\sum_{1\leq i< k\leq n}P(A_iA_k)+...+(-1)^{n+1}P(\cap^n_{i=1}A_i).P(∪i=1n​Ai​)=i=1∑n​P(Ai​)−1≤i<k≤n∑​P(Ai​Ak​)+...+(−1)n+1P(∩i=1n​Ai​).

特别地:

P(A∪B)=P(A)+P(B)−P(AB)P(A\cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(AB)P(A∪B)=P(A)+P(B)−P(AB)

P(A∪B∪C)=P(A)+P(B)+P(C)−P(AB)−P(BC)−P(CA)+P(ABC)P(A\cup B\cup C)=P(A)+P(B)+P(C)-P(AB)-P(BC)-P(CA)+P(ABC)P(A∪B∪C)=P(A)+P(B)+P(C)−P(AB)−P(BC)−P(CA)+P(ABC)

entry.title: 1.3 条件概率
entry.content:
条件概率

定义(条件概率)

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, A,B∈FA,B\in FA,B∈F , 且 P(B)>0P(B)>0P(B)>0

P(A∣B)=^P(AB)P(B)P(A|B)\hat{=}\frac{P(AB)}{P(B)}P(A∣B)=^P(B)P(AB)​

称为事件 BBB 发生的条件下, 事件 AAA 发生的条件概率.

条件概率是一种概率

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, B∈FB\in FB∈F , 且 P(B)>0P(B)>0P(B)>0 , 则对 ∀A∈F\forall A\in F∀A∈F 有 P(⋅∣B)P(\cdot|B)P(⋅∣B) 对应, 实数集函数 P(A∣B)P(A|B)P(A∣B) 满足三条公理:

  1. ∀A∈F,0≤P(A∣B)≤1\forall A \in F, 0\leq P(A|B)\leq1∀A∈F,0≤P(A∣B)≤1 ;
  2. P(Ω∣B)=1P(\Omega|B)=1P(Ω∣B)=1 ;
  3. Ai∈F,i=1,2,...A_i \in F, i=1,2,...Ai​∈F,i=1,2,... , 且 Ai∩Aj=Φ,(i≠j)A_i\cap A_j=\Phi,(i\not=j)Ai​∩Aj​=Φ,(i=j) , 则$$P\bigg( \bigcup_{i=1}^{\infty} A_i|B \bigg)=\sum\limits_{i=1}^{\infty}P(A_i|B)$$

定义(条件概率空间)

记 PB=P(⋅∣B)P_B=P(\cdot|B)PB​=P(⋅∣B) , 则 PBP_BPB​ 是可测空间 (Ω,F)(\Omega,F)(Ω,F) 上的概率, 对任意 A∈FA\in FA∈F 有

PB(A)=^P(A∩B)P(B)P_B(A)\hat{=}\frac{P(A\cap B)}{P(B)}PB​(A)=^P(B)P(A∩B)​

则称 (Ω,F,PB)(\Omega,F,P_B)(Ω,F,PB​) 是条件概率空间.

乘法公式

乘法公式

设 P(B)>0P(B)>0P(B)>0 , 则有 P(AB)=P(B)P(A∣B)P(AB)=P(B)P(A|B)P(AB)=P(B)P(A∣B) ;
若 P(A)>0P(A)>0P(A)>0 , 则 P(AB)=P(A)P(B∣A)P(AB)=P(A)P(B|A)P(AB)=P(A)P(B∣A) .

跟一般地有, 若 P(A1A2...An−1)>0P(A_1A_2...A_{n-1})>0P(A1​A2​...An−1​)>0 , 则

P(A1A2...An−1An)=P(A1)P(A2∣A1)...P(An∣A1A2...An−1)P(A_1A_2...A_{n-1}A_n)=P(A_1)P(A_2|A_1)...P(A_n|A_1A_2...A_{n-1})P(A1​A2​...An−1​An​)=P(A1​)P(A2​∣A1​)...P(An​∣A1​A2​...An−1​)

意义

乘法公式把多个事件同时发生的概率转化成一系列条件概率的乘积.

全概率公式

定义(有限划分)

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, 若

∀Bi,Bj∈F,有 Bi∩Bj=Φ,(i=1,2,...n, i≠j)\forall B_i,B_j\in F,\quad \text{有}\ B_i\cap B_j=\Phi ,(i=1,2,...n,\ i\not=j)∀Bi​,Bj​∈F,有 Bi​∩Bj​=Φ,(i=1,2,...n, i=j)

且

B1∪B2∪...∪Bn=ΩB_1\cup B_2\cup...\cup B_n=\OmegaB1​∪B2​∪...∪Bn​=Ω

称 B1,B2,...,BnB_1,B_2,...,B_nB1​,B2​,...,Bn​ 为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的一个有限划分(完备事件组).

全概率公式

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, Bi∈F (i=1,2,...,n)B_i\in F\ (i=1,2,...,n)Bi​∈F (i=1,2,...,n) 为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的一个有限划分, P(Bi)>0 (i=1,2,...,n)P(B_i)>0\ (i=1,2,...,n)P(Bi​)>0 (i=1,2,...,n) , 则对任意事件 A∈FA\in FA∈F 有

P(A)=∑i=1nP(Bi)P(A∣Bi)P(A)=\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P(B_i)P(A|B_i)P(A)=i=1∑n​P(Bi​)P(A∣Bi​)

注

全概率公式对可列无穷划分也成立.

条件全概率公式

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 是概率空间, Bi∈F (i=1,2,...,n)B_i\in F\ (i=1,2,...,n)Bi​∈F (i=1,2,...,n) 为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的一个有限(或无限)划分, 则对固定的 D∈FD\in FD∈F , 对任意的 Bi∈F,P(D∪Bi)>0B_i\in F,P(D\cup B_i)>0Bi​∈F,P(D∪Bi​)>0 , 以及任意事件 A∈FA\in FA∈F 有:

P(A∣D)=PDA=∑i=1nPD(Bi)PD(A∣Bi)=∑i=1nP(Bi∣D)P(A∣Bi∩D)P(A|D)=P_D{A}=\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P_D(B_i)P_D(A|B_i)=\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P(B_i|D)P(A|B_i\cap D)P(A∣D)=PD​A=i=1∑n​PD​(Bi​)PD​(A∣Bi​)=i=1∑n​P(Bi​∣D)P(A∣Bi​∩D)

意义

全概率公式常用于多个原因导致一个结果发生的知因求果型问题的概率预测.

贝叶斯公式

贝叶斯公式

设 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 为概率空间, Bi∈F(i=1,2,...,n)B_i\in F(i=1,2,...,n)Bi​∈F(i=1,2,...,n) 为 Ω\OmegaΩ 的一个有限划分, 且 P(Bi)>0 (i=1,2,...,n)P(B_i)>0\ (i=1,2,...,n)P(Bi​)>0 (i=1,2,...,n) , 则对任意 A∈F,P(A)>0A\in F, P(A)>0A∈F,P(A)>0 有:

P(Bj∣A)=P(Bj)P(A∣Bj)∑i=1nP(Bi)P(A∣Bi)(j=1,2,...,n)P(B_j|A)=\frac{P(B_j)P(A|B_j)}{\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P(B_i)P(A|B_i)} \quad (j=1,2,...,n)P(Bj​∣A)=i=1∑n​P(Bi​)P(A∣Bi​)P(Bj​)P(A∣Bj​)​(j=1,2,...,n)

注

贝叶斯公式对可列无穷划分情形也成立.

意义

  1. 用于执果寻因型问题的概率计算
  2. 基于新信息修正先验概率(计算后验概率)

小结

  1. 条件概率可以看出一种概率, 有两种理解方式:
    1. 通过改变概率 PPP , 将概率空间 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 映射成了 (Ω,F,PB)(\Omega,F,P_B)(Ω,F,PB​)
    2. 通过缩减样本空间得到新的可测空间, 将概率空间 (Ω,F,P)(\Omega,F,P)(Ω,F,P) 映射成了 (Ω′,F′,PB′)(\Omega',F',P_B')(Ω′,F′,PB′​)
  2. 在解决条件概率相关问题时, 应该注意:
    1. 概率空间的确定
    2. 哪些事件已经发生, 哪些还未发生
    3. 提到的概率哪些是条件概率
  3. 条件概率相关公式及意义:
    | | 公式 | 意义 |
    |:------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:—|
    | 乘法公式 | P(A1A2...An−1An)=P(A1)P(A2∣A1)...P(An∣A1A2...An−1)P(A_1A_2...A_{n-1}A_n)=P(A_1)P(A_2\lvert A_1)...P(A_n\lvert A_1A_2...A_{n-1})P(A1​A2​...An−1​An​)=P(A1​)P(A2​∣A1​)...P(An​∣A1​A2​...An−1​) | 乘法公式把多个事件同时发生的概率转化成一系列条件概率的乘积. |
    | 全概率公式 | P(A)=∑i=1nP(Bi)P(A∣Bi)P(A)=\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P(B_i)P(A\vert B_i)P(A)=i=1∑n​P(Bi​)P(A∣Bi​) | 全概率公式常用于多个原因导致一个结果发生的知因求果型问题的概率预测. |
    | 贝叶斯公式 |P(Bj∣A)=P(Bj)P(A∣Bj)∑i=1nP(Bi)P(A∣Bi)(j=1,2,...,n)P(B_j\lvert A)=\frac{P(B_j)P(A\vert B_j)}{\sum\limits^{n}_{i=1}P(B_i)P(A\lvert B_i)} \quad (j=1,2,...,n)P(Bj​∣A)=i=1∑n​P(Bi​)P(A∣Bi​)P(Bj​)P(A∣Bj​)​(j=1,2,...,n) | \begin{align} &\text{1. 用于执果寻因型问题的概率计算} \\ &\text{2. 基于新信息修正先验概率(计算后验概率)}\end{align} |

entry.title: 1.2 概率
entry.content:
概率

概率的直观意义

随机事件发生的可能性大小是一个客观存在的量, 概率是对随机事件发生可能性大小的客观度量.
事件A出现的概率记为 P(A)P(A)P(A) .

主观概率

主观概率是某人对特定事件发生可能性的度量.
有一定依据, 但很难一致, 不够科学.

古典概率

定义(古典概型)

设 EEE 是一个随机试验, 若它满足以下两个条件:

  1. 仅有有限多个基本事件;
  2. 每个基本事件发生的可能性相等.
    则称 EEE 为古典概型试验.

定义(古典概率)

设试验 EEE 为古典概型试验, Ai,i=1,2,...,nA_i,i=1,2,...,nAi​,i=1,2,...,n 是基本事件, 则由

P(A)=A所含的基本事件个数基本事件总数=A所含样本点的数目样本空间的样本点总数P(A)=\frac{A所含的基本事件个数}{基本事件总数}=\frac{A所含样本点的数目}{样本空间的样本点总数}P(A)=基本事件总数A所含的基本事件个数​=样本空间的样本点总数A所含样本点的数目​

所确定的概率称为事件 AAA 的古典概率.

性质

  1. 非负性: 对任意 AAA , 有 0≤P(A)≤10\leq P(A)\leq10≤P(A)≤1 ;
  2. 规范性: P(Ω)=1P(\Omega)=1P(Ω)=1 ;
  3. 有限可加性: 若 A1,A2,....,AmA_1,A_2,....,A_mA1​,A2​,....,Am​ 互不相容, 则 P(∪i=1mAi)=∑i=1mP(Ai)P(\cup_{i=1}^mA_i)=\sum_{i=1}^mP(A_i)P(∪i=1m​Ai​)=∑i=1m​P(Ai​) .

局限性

只有在古典概型试验的理想特殊情况下, 古典概率才是对事件发生可能性大小的客观度量.

几何概率

定义

设 nnn 维欧式空间的子集 Ω\OmegaΩ 表示样本空间. 若 Ω\OmegaΩ 及其子集 AAA 均可度量, 则度量值之比 P(A)=μ(A)μ(Ω)P(A)=\frac{\mu(A)}{\mu(\Omega)}P(A)=μ(Ω)μ(A)​ 称为事件 AAA 发生的集合概率.

性质

  1. 非负性: 对任意 AAA , 有 0≤P(A)≤10\leq P(A)\leq10≤P(A)≤1 ;
  2. 规范性: P(Ω)=1P(\Omega)=1P(Ω)=1 ;
  3. 有限可加性: 若 A1,A2,....,AmA_1,A_2,....,A_mA1​,A2​,....,Am​ 互不相容, 则 P(∪i=1mAi)=∑i=1mP(Ai)P(\cup_{i=1}^mA_i)=\sum_{i=1}^mP(A_i)P(∪i=1m​Ai​)=∑i=1m​P(Ai​) .
  4. 完全(可列)可加性: 若 A1,A2,....,Am,...A_1,A_2,....,A_m,...A1​,A2​,....,Am​,... 互不相容, 则 P(∪i=1∞Ai)=∑i=1∞P(Ai)P(\cup_{i=1}^\infty A_i)=\sum_{i=1}^\infty P(A_i)P(∪i=1∞​Ai​)=∑i=1∞​P(Ai​) .

Establish the importance of the topic as a problem to be addressed

Synthesising material: bringing sources together

Others have highlighted the relevance of …. But Smith (2008) is much more concerned with …

Giving reasons why a method was adopted or rejected

The study uses qualitative analysis in order to gain insights into …
One advantage of the X analysis is that it avoids the problem of …

rejected

A major problem with the experimental method is that …
The main disadvantage of the experimental method is that …
However, there are certain drawbacks associated with the use of …
There are certain problems with the use of focus groups. One of these is that there is less …

Sequence words

Prior to
After
On
Once
Following
When
In the follow-up phase of the study,
The final stage of the study

Indicating methodolgical problems or limitations

In particular, the analysis of X was problematic.
In observational studies, there is a potential for bias from …
The small size of the dataset meant that it was not possible to …
Further data collection is required to determine exactly how X affects Y.
Another major source of uncertainty is in the method used to calculate X.
In this investigation there are several sources for error. The main error is …
It was not possible to investigate the significant relationships of X and Y further because…
The responses relating to X were subjective and were therefore susceptible to recall bias.

  • C.

  • D.

Under the current educational system, the extracurricular activities designed for students are playing an increasingly important role. Therefore, among parents and teachers, there arises a controversy pertaining whether teenage students should participate in various activities or focus on one activity. Towards such a long-running tug-of-war, I strongly recommend teenagers to engage in more kinds of activities, for the following reasons.

Initially, getting involved in more activities can be conducive to the well rounded development of students. It is self-evident that different activities can equip participants with various skills and abilities. To illustrate, students attending musical classes can learn how to appreciate the classical works of famous musicians and thus improve their aesthetic capability. Similarly, participating in team sports will help students cultivate a sense of cooperation as well as enhance their leadership. After having obtained the above skills, students definitely can develop in an all-round way, with the result of becoming more competitive than others. In contrast, specializing in only one kind of activity is a totally different picture. In other words, students just foster one particular skill,which is a potential obstacle to their future development. The underlying reason is that the more and more complicated modern life necessitates the acquisition of multiple skills.

Furthermore, taking part in many after-class activities can do a better job in helping students find what they are interested in. Just as a saying goes, interest is the best teacher, which clearly indicates the great role played by interest in all levels of education. The above claim is especially true of teens education, because they are in the puberty, the most rebellious period. Put it in another way, without the drive of their own interest, they are less likely to perform well in any activities required by their teachers. In this case, offering various activities to adolescents undoubtedly can more effectively stimulate their interest and passion. Once they find what they like, they will automatically put more efforts and time in it.

However, requiring all teenagers to solely engage in one activities may fail to cater to the interest of the majorities of them.

All in all, we can draw the conclusion that it is a wiser move for students to attend multiple activities, in order to obtain a holistic development and find what they are passionate for.

  89. In the 1760s, James Watt perfected a separate condenser for the steam, so that the cylinder did not have to be cooled at every stroke; then he devised a way to make the piston turn a wheel and thus convert reciprocating (back and forth) motion into rotary motion.

  90. Unlike short-term financial coorperation between investors for a single commercial undertaking, joint-stock companies provided permanent funding of capital by drawing on the investors of merchants and other investors who purchased shares in the company.

  91. This was justified by the view that reflective practice could teachers to feel more intellectually involved in their role and work in teaching and enable them to cope with the paucity of scientific fact and the uncertanty of knowlegye in the discipline of teaching.

  92. There were no other public buildings, suggesting that the priests who were in charegded of temples also were responsible in governing the city and orgnizing people working in the fields and on irrigation projects building and maintaining systems of ditches and dams.

  93. Inequalities of wealth and rank certainliy exist, and have probably existed in most pastoralist societies, but except in periods of military conquest, they are normally too slight to generate the stable, hereditary hierarchies that are usually implied by the term class.

  94. Many ecologists now think that the relative long-term stability of climax communities comes from diversity but from the “patchness” of the environment; an environment that varies from palce to place supports more organisms than an environment that is uniform.

  95. According to conventional theory, yawning takes place when people are bored or sleepy and serves the function of increasing alertness by reversing, thought deeper breathing, the drop in blood oxygen levels that are caused by the shallow breathing that accompanies lack of sleep or boredom.

Well, just as the marathon was one of the concluding events of the Olympic Games, we’re bringing our broadcast marathon to a close beyond the competitive drama. Every Olympics provides a snapshot of a city and a country at a point of time. This one was more compelling than most since China’s rise and its onging transformation is the global story not only the moment, but likely the foreseeable future these Olympics were a milestone in that still unfolding story and well history will tell us whether or not the Olympics provided China with the confidence to not only build on its considerable strengths but also to address its considerable problems. This much we know, this is a country so vast, a people with lives so varied in a history so rich and complex that no visitor can fully grasp it. Still at these games no advanced degree in international relations was required to appreciate the genuine warmth of the Chinese people, the history pride in their country and how seriously Chinses citizens famous Olympics-everyday men and women took this chance to show themselves to the world. All Olympics are important to their city. These games were monumentally important to the host nation, which happens to be home to one-fifth of humanity. All that said just as these Olympics were significant politically, they were also very significant competitively and their Beijing turned out to be among the most memorable Olympics ever. One headline was antipated before the games began and then verified here for the first time since the fall of the Berlin Wall and ongoing Olympic rivalry shapes up in Beijing. The u.s. won 110 medals, the most it’s ever won at a non-american Olympics. But China second in overall count easily won the most goals here and the most by any country since the old Soviet Union in 1988. Many of China’s triuumphs went beyond excellence. Their perfection and precision simply beatiful to behold. China is now a sports power with a sophisticated state-surppoted sports system. He’ll be at or near the top the medal list in London and beyond. Meanwhile the Americans had plenty to cheer about beach volleyball pairs both prevailing Natia Liukin and Shawn Johnson winning gold and winning hearts, the men’s basketball team doing exactly what they set out to do, win yes, but also redeem and redefine the image and purpose of the u.s. program. These games reached multiple cresecendos. From the begining, there was Michael Phelps who now ranks among the very greatest Olympics ever and it was also now in the top tier of the best and most popular contemporay athletes in any sport unheard of for swimmer until Phelps. Just about the time Phelps left the pool, a Jamaican jet zoomed over the track. The Sprint’s are supposed to be decided by blinks of an eye, not by bolts of spead so astonishing that like the spectators, the competitors can only marvel at the worlds and history’s fastest man more than nations 204 participated here than any games before and more won medals 87 than ever before as well. But beyond the medal podium the Olympics remand a human panorama with many also-ran finishes and first round eliminations nonetheless represnting epic personal stories fully appreciated only by the participants themselves and families, friends and countrymen. These games began with Johnny Mo’s stunning opening ceremony so boldly conceived and brilliantly executed that it set a standard for such occasions unlikely to be equalled and tonight with more theatrical touches the curtain came dowm. So the people of world came to Beijing and the people of China extened their hand. You don’t have to speak a word of Mandarin to understand that i’ve been fortunate to be involved with many Olympics. And in many way, this has been the most memorable in no small part due to the efforts of a samll army of people who work tirelesslty to bring these games home to you. For these colleagues, I will always have enormous professional regard and personal gratitude the names of these talented men and women accompany this fianal montage of images of China and Olympic moments, moments we hope resonate with as they have with us. Goodnight, this one lat time from China.
The executive producer of the Olympic Games and the opening ceremony was Dick Ebersol. The producer of the Olympic Games and teh opening ceremony was David Neil. The director of the Olympic Games and opening ceremony it was Bucky guns.The president of NBC Olympic is Gray Zheng Kel.

entry.title: 0.4 有效数字缺失
entry.content:
误差

误差来源

  1. 模型误差
  2. 观测误差
  3. 方法误差
  4. 计算(舍入)误差

误差的基本计算

  1. 加法: e(x±y)=e(x)±e(y)e(x\pm y)=e(x)\pm e(y)e(x±y)=e(x)±e(y)
  2. 乘法: e(xy)=ye(x)+x∗e(y)e(xy)=ye(x)+x^*e(y)e(xy)=ye(x)+x∗e(y)
  3. 除法: e(xy)=ye(x)−xe(y)yy∗e(\frac{x}{y})=\frac{ye(x)-xe(y)}{yy^*}e(yx​)=yy∗ye(x)−xe(y)​

有效数字

当 xxx 的绝对误差限为某一位的半个单位, 则这一位到第一个非零位的位数称为 xxx 的有效位数.

小结

  1. 由误差的基本计算: 相近不做差, 小数不做除

entry.title: 0.3 实数的浮点表示
entry.content:
IEEE745 浮点数

定义

分类

例子


注：

  1. 第一位是符号位, 代表浮点数的正负.
  2. 第二位是指数位的第一位, 代表指数的正负:
    1. 当其为1时, 指数p>0p>0p>0
    2. 当其为0, 且其他符号位全为1时, p=0p=0p=0
    3. 当其为0, 且其他符号位不全为1时, p<0p<0p<0

特殊指数

(00000000000)2(00000000000)_2(00000000000)2​ 表示 2−10222^{-1022}2−1022
(11111111111)2(11111111111)_2(11111111111)2​ 表示 2∞2^\infty2∞ (尾数位必须全零)

机器精度

机器精度 εmach\varepsilon_{mach}εmach​ 是 111 和比 111 大的最小浮点数之间的距离.
nnn 位尾数的 IEEE754 浮点数 εmarch=2−n\varepsilon_{march}=2^{-n}εmarch​=2−n

εmach =2−52≈2.22×10−16\varepsilon_{\text {mach }}=2^{-52} \approx 2.22 \times 10^{-16}εmach ​=2−52≈2.22×10−16

舍入

最近原则

  1. 第53位尾数为0, 则在第52位之后舍去 (舍去)
  2. 第53位尾数为1, 第53位之后非全零, 则在第52位加一 (进位)
  3. 第53位尾数为1, 第53位之后全零, 则依据使第52位等于0选择舍去或进位:
    1. 第52位为1, 则进位
    2. 第52位为0, 则舍去

加法

对齐小数位 →\rightarrow→ 高精度加法寄存器 →\rightarrow→ 舍入回相应精度

数值计算的基本原则

重要指标

  1. 速度
  2. 精度

原则

尽量减少工作量 (乘除法次数)

如: 多项式计算使用秦九昭算法

保持数据稳定性

迭代算法要求在迭代的过程中误差不断减小
若迭代过程中误差不断增大, 可以考虑逆向迭代

小结

  1. 熟悉 IEEE754 浮点数的表示方法
  2. 熟悉数值计算的基本原则
  3. 相近不做差, 小数不做除

entry.title: 0.2 二进制数字
entry.content:
十进制转二进制

（...b1×22+b2×21+b0+b−1×2−1+b−2×2−2...）10=(...b2b1b0b−1b−2)2（...b_1\times2^{2}+ b_2\times 2^1+b_0+b_{-1}\times 2^{-1}+b_{-2}\times2^{-2}...）_{10}=(...b_2b_1b_0b_{-1}b_{-2})_2（...b1​×22+b2​×21+b0​+b−1​×2−1+b−2​×2−2...）10​=(...b2​b1​b0​b−1​b−2​)2​
从手工计算上来说：
小数点前: 略
小数点后: 每次乘2, 小于1则该位为0, 大于1则-1且该位为1

一些数字

27=128,28=256,29=512,210=1024,211=20482^7=128, 2^8=256, 2^9=512, 2^{10}=1024, 2^{11}=204827=128,28=256,29=512,210=1024,211=2048

entry.title: 1.1 随机事件与随机变量
entry.content:
随机现象

  1. 事前不可预言
  2. 大量重复实验呈现规律

随机实验

  1. 可在相同条件 (人为可控, 相对重要的条件) 下重复进行. (可重复性)
  2. 事情可明确实验的全部可能结果. (结果明确性)
  3. 实验前不能预言将出现哪一个. (不可预言性)

随机事件 (事件)

  1. 基于一定的实验目的
  2. 可能发生也可能不发生

基本事件

  1. 一次实验中必发生一个且仅发生一个
  2. 最简单 (不能分解)

复合事件

由若干基本事件组合而成的事件

必然事件 (Ω\OmegaΩ)

做一次随机实验必定发生的事件

不可能事件 (Φ\PhiΦ)

做一次随机实验必定不发生的事件

样本空间

定义

基本事件的对应元素全体所组成的集合 Ω\OmegaΩ 称为实验的样本空间
样本空间的元素称为样本点
注: 样本空间与实验目的有关!

各种事件在样本空间中的集合表示

事件集合
随机事件集合 Ω\OmegaΩ
基本事件单点集 {ω}\{\omega\}{ω}
复合事件子集 A⊂ΩA\subset\OmegaA⊂Ω
必然事件全集 Ω\OmegaΩ
不可能事件空集 Φ\PhiΦ

随机事件的运算

在一次实验中, 若实验结果 ω\omegaω 是 A 中元素, 即 ω∈A\omega\in Aω∈A , 则称事件 A 发生.

包含关系

A⊂BA\subset BA⊂B : 事件A发生, 则事件B必发生.

和事件

A∪BA\cup BA∪B : 事件A与事件B至少发生一个.

积事件

A∩BA\cap BA∩B (ABABAB): 事件A与事件B同时发生

互不相容

AB=∅AB=\emptysetAB=∅ : 事件A与事件B不能同时发生.

逆事件 (对立事件)

B=\hlineA (AB=∅∧A∪B=ΩAB=\emptyset\land A\cup B=\OmegaAB=∅∧A∪B=Ω)：事件A与事件B必发生一个且仅发生一个.

差事件

A−BA-BA−B : 事件A发生且事件B不发生.

小结

  1. 事件与样本空间都与"实验目的"有关

一些随想

#一些随想 虽然你之前的TOEFL阅读与听力，在某些时候有较好的发挥，但今天的练习证明你的英语水平依旧十分低下，距离你的TOEFL目标分数依旧十分遥远，之前练习时的好运并不会每次都眷顾你(2023.1.8)，唯有忍辱负重，砥砺前行，每天坚持进行英语的输入输出，将你真实的英语水平提高上去，你才能得到你想要的分数。
此外，这两天都没有跑步，你的精神状态也一天不如一天，所以你每天早晨要坚持跑步。你还要考虑需不需要将跑步列入你的微习惯之中。

2022-09-03的日记

星期六
[[35_2022-09-02 | <<前一天的日记]] | [[35_2022-09-04 | 后一天的日记>>]]

重要的任务

我的微习惯

  • [ ] 听听力 #微习惯/听力:
  • [x] 一篇TOEFL阅读 #微习惯/TOEFL阅读:1
  • [x] 俯卧撑25个 #微习惯/俯卧撑:25
  • [x] 开合跳100个 #微习惯/开合跳:100
  • [x] 下蹲20个 #微习惯/下蹲:20

急需处理的事

学习目标

一些随想

#一些随想 明天上午有网课平台测试，后天就正式开学，开始上课了。暑假结束了，想想时间过得真快啊 。6月21日暑假开始到今天9月3日，在学校一共7+21=28天，在家47天，一共75天，即两个半月。
先说在家的时间，基本上就只有躺床上沙发上和在桌前打游戏看视频两个状态，一整天下来，人是打不起精神的，没有足够的学习和运动的动力，懒惰散漫成为常态，人长胖了，变得怠惰拖沓，成天空想而很少付诸行动 ，即使踏出一步两步，那仅有的热情也会因为没有足够的毅力支撑，很快就会被自己的懒惰磨灭掉。
再说在学校的时间，在学校人少，特别是在宿舍只有我一人时，内心会平静很多，会有更多的时间思考，但空想主义似乎仍会占据我的大多数时间，行动力与毅力仍会不足，而且学习生活的效率也会十分低下。在人多的时候，宿舍还有其他人的时候，我会变得浮躁，很难沉下心来思考，于是一开始我的动力会增加，学习生活的效率会提高，但久而久之对自我的控制力依旧会下降，会出现三天打鱼两天晒网的情况。
在学校时，我会渴望在家中的宁静与时间上的自由；在家时，我会渴望在学校时的动力、没有家长的打扰、行为上的自由。于是我就陷入了在两者之间反复横跳，无法同时拥有沉浸思考之心与高效行动能力的恶性循环之中。

如何跳出这个循环？林瑞康，你现在只能先从思想觉悟上“跳出”这个怪圈，但从客观事实上，你会仍然并且长久地身处于这个怪圈之中，在将来的很长一段时间，你会有强烈的无助感（就像踩在棉花上无从着力），所以你需要一份计划来帮助你找到“使劲”的方向。这份计划就像“一条绳子”：这份计划需要有一个宏大的终极目标以确保它能持续到你走出怪圈并且看清世界找到下一个人生目标的时候；它必须要由一个一个切实可行的小目标构成以确保它足够结实不会在你发力的时候断掉；这绳子可能会随着时间的推移而发生变化，但就像革命一样：“革命就像推锯子，有时向前，有时向后，但总的来说是向深处发展的”，你的计划再怎么变化也应该是向着你的最终的目标发展的。
有了这份计划，林瑞康，你剩下需要做的就是紧紧地抓住这条绳子，使劲地向上爬。你会在中途感到满足感，但这份满足感这是暂时的，甚至是对计划的执行有害的，因为它极有可能来自于你的自负与懒惰。你会感到负罪感，想要停下来向下看，也许还会有人把你向下拽，但请你坚持抬头紧盯绳子与目标，不要在意他人的目光与感受，一切都会过去的。你会感到疲惫感，想要停下来，想要躺下来，这是因为你的目标还不够明确，使命感还不够强烈，你心中的那一团火燃烧得还不够纯净，还不够旺盛。你不正当的欲望也会变得强烈，但请你记住，你是在和时间比赛谁先到达终点，请你把这些欲望能立刻汇聚到动力之中的汇聚起来，否则立刻扔掉它们、切断与它们的联系，它们靠近你一次你就踢开他们一次，你需要明白你与它们的关系“你想要什么，你不想要什么，你可以放弃什么？”(2023.1.8)

新学期的计划：[[大二上的学期计划]]
